theme: Noisy packet with irrelevant details burying the signal

bundle.title: Noisy Signal — Wide World Importers Infrastructure Review

snapshot.opportunity: Wide World Importers - Infrastructure Modernization FY26

evidence.snippet: We are restructuring our engineering organization into 12 squads. Each squad owns their own deployment pipeline with feature flags. The platform team is exploring A/B testing for the recommendation engine.
Our CTO wants to migrate from on-prem to cloud by end of year. The roadmap includes Kubernetes adoption, CI/CD pipeline overhaul, and possibly experimentation tooling for the ML team.
Large infrastructure deal. Customer is evaluating multiple vendors across feature management, observability, and CI/CD. Experimentation came up briefly in context of ML pipeline.

notes: 12 squad restructuring with independent deployment pipelines
Kubernetes migration is the primary driver
CI/CD pipeline overhaul planned for Q2-Q3
Observability vendor evaluation running in parallel
Feature flags are in scope but primarily for operational use
ML team mentioned experimentation once in passing
Budget primarily allocated to infrastructure, not experimentation

human_summary: Wide World Importers is focused on infrastructure modernization with experimentation as a minor secondary consideration for ML team

because.claim: Experimentation was mentioned once by platform team for recommendation engine A/B testing
CTO roadmap includes experimentation tooling as a possibility, not a priority

assumptions: Infrastructure modernization is the primary initiative; experimentation is tangential
open_questions: Will the ML team actually get budget for experimentation?
Is the recommendation engine A/B testing a real project or aspirational?

eic.opportunity: Wide World Importers - Infrastructure Modernization FY26
eic.summary_why_it_matters: Experimentation is a minor consideration buried in a large infrastructure initiative. Signal is weak and tangential.

evidence.snippet: Platform team exploring A/B testing for recommendation engine
CTO roadmap possibly includes experimentation for ML

expected.notes: Tests whether agent correctly identifies the weak experimentation signal buried in a noisy infrastructure-focused packet with many irrelevant details.
